name: AD Mixtape · AD Presents: Sonor Music Editions | Italian Library Music (A Mixtape)
description: Founded in 2013 by Lorenzo Fabrizi and Andrea Galtieri, the Rome based Sonor Music Editions focuses strictly on the world of vintage Italian Library music and original soundtracks, largely from the 1970s and early '80s. Prolific, we asked Fabrizi and Galtieri to curate a medley of sounds via their catalog, and the following mix is most definitely a vibe.

tracks.track: theme from Nel Mondo Del Lavoro album. Insistent, vibrant mood music.
tracks.raw: Lavoro Ripetitivo – theme from Nel Mondo Del Lavoro album. Insistent, vibrant mood music.

tracks.track: Airy, sparkling and beautiful Bossa Nova theme from Vacanze album.
tracks.raw: Sentiero Allegro – Airy, sparkling and beautiful Bossa Nova theme from Vacanze album.

tracks.track: Frenzy Samba Jazz dopeness from Black Sound From White People.
tracks.raw: Free Samba – Frenzy Samba Jazz dopeness from Black Sound From White People.

tracks.track: Stoned groove heater from “UTOPIA” album, 1972, re-released for the first time on Sonor in July 2021.
tracks.raw: Ritorno In Macchina (alt. vers.) – Stoned groove heater from “UTOPIA” album, 1972, re-released for the first time on Sonor in July 2021.

tracks.track: Terrific Voodoo funky theme from the Emanuelle In America OST, mental Afro-Beat music with dancing percussion and esoteric vibrations.
tracks.raw: Trouble – Terrific Voodoo funky theme from the Emanuelle In America OST, mental Afro-Beat music with dancing percussion and esoteric vibrations.

tracks.track: Another track winner from Nel Mondo Del Lavoro, with down tempo Lounge Funk, flowing rhythms and flute, harpsichord on evidence.
tracks.raw: Edilizia – Another track winner from Nel Mondo Del Lavoro, with down tempo Lounge Funk, flowing rhythms and flute, harpsichord on evidence.

tracks.track: Words spoken over Free Jazz rhythm, from the great Black Sound From White People.
tracks.raw: Sara’ Stato Il Futuro – Words spoken over Free Jazz rhythm, from the great Black Sound From White People.

tracks.track: Instrumental – From the Emanuelle In America OST; mind-blowing theme, with dreamy orchestral arrangements
tracks.raw: I Celebrate Myself – Instrumental – From the Emanuelle In America OST; mind-blowing theme, with dreamy orchestral arrangements

tracks.track: Another golden track from the Vacanze album, driven loungy vibes with dreamy and flowing atmosphere.
tracks.raw: Panorama Beach – Another golden track from the Vacanze album, driven loungy vibes with dreamy and flowing atmosphere.

tracks.track: Always from Vacanze, a bouncy Jazz-Funk driven theme with shapy harpsichord and strings.
tracks.raw: Fabbricauto – Always from Vacanze, a bouncy Jazz-Funk driven theme with shapy harpsichord and strings.

tracks.track: Bluesy Jazz from Black Sound From White People, with Giancarlo Barigozzi soprano sax on evidence.
tracks.raw: Krypto Blues – Bluesy Jazz from Black Sound From White People, with Giancarlo Barigozzi soprano sax on evidence.

tracks.track: Complex, industrial mood music from the Nel Mondo Del Lavoro album with an obsessive movement.
tracks.raw: Ingranaggi – Complex, industrial mood music from the Nel Mondo Del Lavoro album with an obsessive movement.

tracks.track: Final track for this mix, is the one that brings the name of its album, Utopia. Avant-garde building theme on improvised notes.
tracks.raw: Utopia – Final track for this mix, is the one that brings the name of its album, Utopia. Avant-garde building theme on improvised notes.
